title: 10 best herbal teas for erectile dysfunction
description: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, teas helps with erectile dysfunction because it contains compounds that improve blood flow and reduce stress. The herb's adaptogenic properties help regulate cortisol levels, which can contribute to ED. Ashwagandha's antioxidants and flavonoids also promote overall vascular health, allowing for increased blood flow to the penis.
